values.description: Base URL for every request. Default is the local go-gateway. To hit a service directly (bypassing the gateway, no rate-limit headers), point this at the service port instead, for example http://localhost:3010 for accounts-service.
Bearer JWT used by the collection-level auth. CRM /api/v1 routes require the admin role. See postman/README.md for how to mint a local dev token.
